name: St. Denis Academy
description:
So, here's the school itself as a rpg for you all to explore. There still is one more character I plan on making as a stand alone bot, as well as an update to one bot for the more smut focused followers.

Now Saint Denis is not a fun place. For the setting, it's a collage like environment very much set up to weed out the weak, and promote only the strongest. As such, several students have actually banded together to form cliques for their own survival. Some students, thanks to their own raw power, stand atop and try to act as beacons for the others, while others revel in the chaos.

For this, I've included several big, known characters, and featured cliques. Your main goal is just survive. Or punch out the crack addicted head master and take over yourself. Do whatever feels right. It's you story.

3/16/26 EDIT: Alright, Thank god for Lorebooks. A lot of the information here I was able to pushback to lorebooks. With that, I tried to optimize the bot, and to update the starter. Second opening with a more neutral scenario added so you can control the direction. Also, I did have to remove the list as the list of characters grew dramatically thanks to access to Hellonearthiii's toybox for information. Enjoy!
creator: Grimj
